name: Famous Shimla Kullu Manali Tour From Chandigarh
overview: Escape the urban hustle and immerse yourself in the serenity of lush green valleys – a dream come true, isn't it? Now, it's time to transform this dream into a reality. Consider booking a Shimla and Manali tour to experience pure bliss amidst the breathtaking beauty of valleys and mountains. To truly savor the essence of Shimla and Manali, opting for a cab or taxi tour is an excellent choice. This mode of travel allows you to explore hidden gems and soak in scenic vistas like never before. Moreover, it grants you the freedom to pause for picturesque breaks along the way.
highlights: Shimla, nestled amidst majestic mountains, boasts unparalleled natural beauty with heritage-style buildings and ancient temples.
Kufri is famous for its snow-fun adventure activities and Green Valley for its soothing vibe.
Jakhoo temple is famous for its tall Hanuman statue.
Manali, often hailed as the ultimate destination for couples, is equally appealing to adventure enthusiasts.
Solang Valley and Rohtang Pass offer unmatched scenic views of snow-clad peaks and mountains.

itinerary.title: Chandigarh to Shimla (130 Km, 3-4 Hrs)
itinerary.description: On reaching Chandigarh, our driver will pick you up from the Chandigarh airport /Railway station and take you to Shimla via road. The drive to Shimla will be mesmerizing as the route is full of scenic beauty. You will have an amazing time if you travel in the winter season. On your way to Shimla, you can stop at the two most popular tourist spots - Pinjore Garden and Timber Trail. Timber Trail is known for its scenic resorts - you can have a good time here. Pinjore Garden is ideal for a relaxing break. On reaching Manali, you can check into your hotel and freshen up. You are then free to visit the local Shimla market. Have your dinner and retire for the day.

itinerary.title: Shimla-Kufri Local sightseeing
itinerary.description: It's the day to witness the true beauty of Shimla and nearby places. You can have your delicious breakfast. Get ready for the local Shimla excursion. First, you can visit popular tourist attractions - Kufri, Green Valley, the Indian Institute of Advanced Studies, and the famous Jakhoo Temple / Sankat Mochan Temple of Shimla. Kufri is famous for its snow-fun adventure activities, and Green Valley for its soothing vibe, its heaven for a nature lover. The institute will give an insight into the history of Shimla. Jakhoo temple is famous for its tall Hanuman statue. You can head back to Shimla and visit the most happening place - Mall Road. Mall Road is ideal for shopping and eating street food. Later, you can visit places like - Ridge, The Christ Church of Shimla, The Gaiety Theatre building, and the Scandal point of Shimla to get an insight into Shimla. Head back to your hotel, have dinner, and retire for the day.

itinerary.title: Transfer From Shimla to Manali (260 km / 7-8hrs)
itinerary.description: Get up early to enjoy the mesmerizing sunrise from your room. You can then have your delicious breakfast and check out from your hotel. Today our driver will take you to Manali. The drive to Manali will be wonderful amid the green valleys and splendid views. On the way to Manali, you can stop at popular attractions like - Sundernagar, Mandi, Pandoh Dam, Hanogi Devi temple, and Kullu. The drive from Mandi to Manali along the Beas River is enchanting. Pandoh Dam is an ideal place to stop for tea or lunch break. You can then visit Hanogi Devi temple to seek blessings. Kullu is famous for its shawl-making factories, and you can visit a particular factory to see how these traditional shawls are woven. On reaching Manali, you can check into your hotel and freshen up. You are free to visit the nearby markets and places. Head back to your hotel, have dinner, and retire for the day.

itinerary.title: Manali to Solang Valley and Rohtang Pass
itinerary.description: It's the day to witness the magic of two wonderful places - Solang Valley and Rohtang Pass. Have breakfast, and our driver will take you to Rohtang Pass (with a permit) via Kothi Village, Gulaba, Rahala Waterfalls, And Marhi. The beauty of Rohtang Pass is unmatched - with scenic views of snow-clad peaks and mountains. You can see the mighty Himalayan belt from the place. After which, you can head to Solang Valley via Koksar, Sissu, and Atal tunnel. Solang Valley is known for its snow adventure activities, and you can try activities like - skiing, paragliding, snow scooter ride, etc. Head back to your hotel, have dinner, and retire for the day.

itinerary.title: Manali to Chandigarh Drop (310 Km, 8-9 Hrs)
itinerary.description: It is the last day of your fantastic tour. Have breakfast, and our driver will take you back to Chandigarh and drop you at Chandigarh railway station/Airport. Do enjoy every moment of your tour.

inclusions: All toll taxes, parking fees and driver's allowance.
exclusions: Charges for early Check-In & late Check-Out at Hotel.
Any other item not specified in the Package Inclusions.

faqs.question: Is Shimla suitable for seniors?
faqs.answer: Yes, we ensure comfortable vehicles and well-paced sightseeing. However, we recommend checking weather conditions beforehand.

faqs.question: What is the best time to visit Manali?
faqs.answer: Manali is a year-round paradise. Winter (Dec-Feb) for snow, and Summer (April-June) for pleasant weather.

seo.title: Shimla Kullu Manali Tour Package From Chandigarh | Guru Kripa Travels
seo.description: Book our famous 4 nights 5 days Shimla Kullu Manali taxi tour from Chandigarh. Enjoy scenic views, snow activities, and heritage walks with a private cab.
